summary: Postinstall exfiltrates installer host identifiers to webhook.site
details: The package's postinstall hook executes index.js on `npm install`, which collects the installer's OS username (os.userInfo().username), hostname (os.hostname()), and working directory (process.env.INIT_CWD || process.cwd()) and POSTs them as JSON to a hardcoded webhook.site capture endpoint (https://webhook.site/cde465c1-3853-40ea-880c-fdca6fe508cc). The package advertises no legitimate functionality that would require exfiltrating installer identity to a third-party webhook capture service, and the destination is a generic request-inspection endpoint controlled by an unknown party.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
